narrative:
Precinct Urbana North (precinct in Champaign County) has 950 registered voters, with 46.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.9 percentage points.
